underlying_goal: Implement a complete SSO frontend Web Components SDK based on a detailed implementation plan, with support for both redirect and embedded authentication modes
friction_detail: Initial build failed due to missing @lit/context dependency and incorrect imports; tab switching failed due to wrong SsoEmbedded import path
brief_summary: User requested implementation of an SSO frontend Web Components SDK plan, Claude created a complete monorepo with 3 packages and demo app, fixed build and runtime issues, and pushed all code to GitHub successfully.
